testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: Unable to find resource, invalid path in url. Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-9B29BP4', ip: '10.228.141.15'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: Unable to find resource, invalid path in url.
